exams.name: JEE Main
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with PCM (or PCB+M for B.Arch). Passed in 2024/2025 or appearing 2026. No upper age limit. Indian citizen / NRI / PIO / OCI.
exams.pattern: Paper 1 (B.E./B.Tech): 75 questions across Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, 3 hours, +4/-1. Paper 2A (B.Arch): Maths + Aptitude + Drawing. Paper 2B (B.Plan): Maths + Aptitude + Planning.

exams.name: JEE Advanced
exams.conducting_body: Rotated among 7 zonal IITs (IIT Kanpur conducts in 2026)
exams.eligibility: Top 2,50,000 JEE Main 2026 qualifiers. Class 12 in 2025/2026 with 75% (65% SC/ST). Maximum 2 attempts in consecutive years. Born on or after 1 Oct 2001 (5-year relaxation for SC/ST/PwD).
exams.pattern: Paper 1 + Paper 2 same day, each 3 hours, MCQ + numerical, complex marking with partial credit and negatives. Tests deeper conceptual understanding than JEE Main.

exams.name: AP EAPCET
exams.full_name: Andhra Pradesh Engineering, Agriculture and Pharmacy Common Entrance Test (formerly AP EAMCET)
exams.conducting_body: JNTU Kakinada on behalf of APSCHE
exams.eligibility: Class 12 / AP Inter with PCM (Engineering) or BiPC (Agri/Pharm). Min 16 years by 31 Dec 2026. Indian citizen / PIO / OCI.
exams.pattern: 160 MCQs over 3 hours. Maths 80, Physics 40, Chemistry 40 (Engineering); Botany+Zoology 80, Physics 40, Chemistry 40 (Agri/Pharm). NO negative marking.
exams.registration_window_2026: Early March to April 2026 (with form correction window)
exams.ap_specific_notes: Crucial for AP students who don't crack JEE — a strong EAPCET rank lands you in JNTU/Andhra University with full Jagananna Vidya Deevena fee reimbursement.

exams.name: BITSAT
exams.full_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Admission Test
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with PCM, min 75% aggregate, min 60% in each. Class 12 board toppers (state and CBSE/ICSE) get direct admission. NOT eligible if you took Class 12 supplementary/improvement exam for ALL subjects.
exams.pattern: 130 questions, 3 hours, +3/-1. Maths 40, Physics 30, Chemistry 30, English 10, Logical Reasoning 20. Bonus 12 questions for high scorers.
exams.typical_prep_months: Add 2–3 months on top of JEE Main prep (focus on speed + English/LR)

exams.name: VITEEE
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with PCM (or PCB), min 60% aggregate (50% in Maths). Born on or after 1 July 2004.
exams.pattern: 125 MCQs, 2.5 hours, +1/0 (no negatives). Physics 35, Chemistry 35, Maths/Bio 40, English 5, Aptitude 10.
exams.ap_specific_notes: VIT-AP (Amaravati) is in Andhra — popular fall-back for AP students who don't crack JEE.

exams.name: NEET UG
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotech + English. Min 50% (40% SC/ST/OBC, 45% PwD). Min age 17 by 31 Dec 2026. Indian / NRI / PIO / OCI / Foreign.
exams.pattern: 180 MCQs in 3 hours (2 PM – 5 PM), +4/-1. Physics 45, Chemistry 45, Botany 45, Zoology 45. Conducted in 13 languages including Telugu, across 557 cities + 14 international.

exams.name: AIIMS B.Sc Nursing
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with PCB + English, min 55% (50% SC/ST/OBC). Female candidates only for many seats; male also eligible per AIIMS norms. Min 17 years by 31 Dec 2026. Indian citizen.
exams.pattern: 100 MCQs in 2 hours. Biology 30, Chemistry 25, Physics 25, GK + Aptitude 20. Negative marking.

exams.name: ICAR AIEEA
exams.full_name: All India Entrance Examination for Admission to Agriculture and Allied Sciences
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with PCB or PCM (subject combination depends on the agriculture programme). Min 50%. Min 16 years.
exams.pattern: 150 MCQs, 2.5 hours, +4/-1. Subject-wise based on the chosen agriculture stream.

exams.name: CLAT
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with min 45% (40% SC/ST/PwD). Any stream — MPC, BiPC, MEC, CEC, HEC all eligible. No age limit.
exams.pattern: 120 MCQs in 2 hours, +1/-0.25. English 24, Current Affairs+GK 28, Legal Reasoning 30, Logical Reasoning 24, Quantitative Techniques 14. Comprehension-heavy passages.
exams.registration_window_2026: August – November 2025 for the December 2025 exam
exams.ap_specific_notes: DSNLU (Visakhapatnam) and NALSAR (Hyderabad — neighbouring state) are within reach for AP students. NALSAR ranks #3 NLU nationally per NIRF 2025.

exams.name: AILET
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with min 45% (42% OBC, 40% SC/ST). Any stream. No age limit.
exams.pattern: 150 MCQs in 2 hours, +1/-0.25. English 50, Current Affairs+GK 30, Legal Reasoning 70 (the heaviest weight section).
exams.notes: NLU Delhi does NOT accept CLAT. Only AILET. NIRF rank #2 for Law in India 2025.

exams.name: SET / SLAT
exams.full_name: Symbiosis Entrance Test (UG) / Symbiosis Law Admission Test
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with min 50% (45% SC/ST). Any stream.
exams.pattern: 60 MCQs in 1 hour. Reasoning + General English + Quant + GK. SLAT adds Legal Reasoning.

exams.name: IPMAT Indore
exams.full_name: Integrated Programme in Management Aptitude Test (IIM Indore)
exams.eligibility: Class 12 in 2024/2025 or appearing 2026, min 60% (55% SC/ST/PwD) in Class 10 and Class 12. Born on or after 1 Aug 2006 (5-yr relaxation SC/ST/PwD).
stream_required: any (any stream OK; Maths preferred for QA section)
exams.pattern: 90 questions in 120 min. Quantitative Ability (MCQ) 30, Quantitative Ability (Short Answer) 15, Verbal Ability 45.
exams.notes: 5-year integrated BBA + MBA. Exit option after 3 years with BBA. Average placement at IIM Indore: ₹25 LPA.

exams.name: IPMAT Rohtak
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with min 60% (55% SC/ST/DAP). Max 20 yrs as of 30 June 2026 (25 yrs SC/ST). Any stream.
exams.pattern: 120 questions in 120 min. Quantitative Ability 40, Logical Reasoning 40, Verbal Ability 40. +4/-1.

exams.name: JIPMAT
exams.full_name: Joint IPM Admission Test (IIM Jammu + IIM Bodh Gaya)
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with min 60% (55% reserved). Max age 20 yrs by 31 July 2026.
exams.pattern: 100 questions in 150 min. Quant 33, Logical Reasoning 33, Verbal 34. +4/-1.
exams.ap_specific_notes: IIFT Kakinada (in AP) accepts IPMAT scores for its 5-yr integrated programme — important for AP students who want IIM-tier business education without leaving the state.

exams.name: CUET UG
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with min 45% (40% SC/ST/PwD per university). Any stream. Eligibility set by participating universities.
exams.pattern: Pick subjects you want. Each subject = 60 minutes, 50 MCQs, +5/-1. Sections: 13 languages, 23 domain-specific, 1 General Test. Down from 63 to 37 subjects in 2026.
exams.participating_universities: 230+ central, state, deemed, and private universities
exams.notes: Class 12 percentage no longer determines DU admission — only your CUET score does.

exams.name: NDA & NA
exams.full_name: National Defence Academy and Naval Academy Examination
exams.eligibility: Unmarried male/female. Born between 1 Jul 2007 – 1 Jul 2010 for NDA-1 2026. Class 12 (Army Wing); Class 12 with PCM (Air Force/Navy/Naval Academy).
exams.pattern: Two papers: Maths (300 marks, 2.5 hr), General Ability Test (600 marks, 2.5 hr). Negative marking. Followed by SSB Interview (900 marks).
exams.notes: After NDA, 3 years of training at the National Defence Academy (Pune), then service-specific academy training. Commissioned as Lieutenant / Sub-Lt / Flying Officer.

exams.name: AISSEE (Sainik School)
exams.full_name: All India Sainik Schools Entrance Examination
exams.eligibility: Class 6: born 1 Apr 2014 – 31 Mar 2016 (10–12 yrs). Class 9: born 1 Apr 2011 – 31 Mar 2013 (13–15 yrs). Boys and girls.
exams.pattern: Class 6: 300 marks (Maths 150, Lang 50, Intel 50, GK 50). Class 9: 400 marks (Maths 200, English 50, Intel 100, GK 25, Science 25).
exams.ap_specific_notes: Sainik School Korukonda (Vizianagaram) and Sainik School Kalikiri (Chittoor) are in AP. Strong NDA pipeline.

exams.name: NID DAT
exams.full_name: National Institute of Design — Design Aptitude Test
exams.eligibility: Class 12 in any stream, age cut-off 20 yrs (B.Des) / 24 yrs (M.Des) on 30 Jun 2026.
exams.pattern: Prelims: 100 marks, 3 hours, MCQ + subjective (sketches, observations). Mains: studio test + portfolio + interview.
exams.ap_specific_notes: NID Andhra Pradesh (Vijayawada) is operational — first NID in South India.

exams.name: NIFT
exams.full_name: National Institute of Fashion Technology Entrance Exam
exams.eligibility: Class 12 from any board, any stream. Max age 24 yrs (relaxation for reserved categories).
exams.pattern: Creative Ability Test (CAT) + General Ability Test (GAT) + Situation Test (B.Des) or GD-PI (B.FTech).

exams.name: UCEED
exams.full_name: Undergraduate Common Entrance Examination for Design
exams.eligibility: Class 12 in 2025/2026 in any stream. Born on or after 1 Oct 2001 (5-yr relaxation reserved). Max 2 attempts in consecutive years.
exams.pattern: 300 marks in 3 hours. Section A: Visualization, Observation, Design Sensitivity, Environmental Awareness. Section B: 6 free-form drawing/composition questions.

exams.name: NATA
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with PCM, min 50%. Or 10+3 diploma with Maths.
exams.pattern: 125 questions in 3 hours. MCQ + numerical + match the following + drawing/visualisation.

exams.name: CA Foundation
exams.conducting_body: Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
exams.frequency: Three times a year (Jan, May, Sep)
exams.eligibility: Class 12 passed (or appearing). Provisional registration after Class 10. Minimum 4 months study period before exam. No age limit.
stream_required: any (CEC/MEC easier transition; MPC also fine)
exams.pattern: 4 papers, 3 hours each. Paper 1 Accounting (subjective), Paper 2 Business Laws (subjective), Paper 3 Quant Aptitude (MCQ), Paper 4 Business Economics (MCQ). Pass: 40% per paper, 50% aggregate.
exams.typical_completion_years: 4.5–5 years from Class 12 (Foundation → Inter → 3-yr Articleship → Final)

exams.name: CSEET
exams.conducting_body: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
exams.frequency: Three times a year (Feb, June, Oct from June 2026)
exams.eligibility: Class 12 passed (or appearing). No age limit. CA Final / CMA Final passers exempt (₹5,000 fee for CS Executive direct entry).
exams.pattern: 4 papers, 120 min total. Business Communication, Legal Aptitude & Logical Reasoning, Economic & Business Environment, Current Affairs. MCQ. Pass: 40% per paper, 50% aggregate.

exams.name: CMA Foundation
exams.conducting_body: Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI)
exams.eligibility: Class 12 passed. No upper age limit.
exams.pattern: 4 papers, 100 marks each. Fundamentals of Business Laws, Fundamentals of Financial Accounting, Fundamentals of Business Mathematics & Statistics, Fundamentals of Business Economics & Management.

exams.name: CFA Level 1
exams.full_name: Chartered Financial Analyst — Level 1 (CFA Institute, USA)
exams.frequency: Four windows a year (Feb, May, Aug, Nov)
exams.eligibility: Currently enrolled in undergraduate degree (within 23 months of graduation) OR working professional. Possible directly after Class 12 if enrolled in college.
exams.pattern: 180 MCQs split into two 2-hour 15-min sessions. Topics: Ethics, Quant Methods, Economics, Financial Reporting, Corporate Issuers, Equity, Fixed Income, Derivatives, Alternatives, Portfolio Management.

exams.name: IISER IAT
exams.conducting_body: Indian Institutes of Science Education and Research
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with science stream (any 3 of PCMB), passed in 2024/2025/2026. Min cut-off varies.
exams.pattern: 60 MCQs in 3 hours, +3/-1. Biology 15, Chemistry 15, Maths 15, Physics 15.
exams.ap_specific_notes: IISER Tirupati is in AP — top science research school within the state. INSPIRE-SHE scholarship of ₹80,000/year available.

exams.name: CMI Entrance
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with PCM. Indian National Mathematics Olympiad (INMO) qualifiers get direct entry.
exams.pattern: Maths-heavy paper with subjective + MCQ. Ranks among India's hardest UG science entrances.

exams.name: ISI Admission Test
exams.full_name: Indian Statistical Institute B.Stat / B.Math Entrance
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with Maths and English.
exams.pattern: Multiple-choice + descriptive maths-heavy paper, then interview shortlist.
exams.stipend_info: ISI offers ₹5,000/month stipend during BStat/BMath — one of India's only paid undergraduate programmes.

exams.name: NCHM JEE
exams.full_name: National Council for Hotel Management Joint Entrance Examination
exams.eligibility: Class 12 in any stream with English. Age 25 yrs max (28 SC/ST).
exams.pattern: 200 MCQs in 3 hours. Numerical & Analytical, Reasoning & Logical Deduction, GK & Current Affairs, English, Aptitude for Service Sector. +4/-1.

exams.name: UPSC CSE
exams.full_name: Civil Services Examination (IAS / IPS / IFS / 24 services)
exams.eligibility: Bachelor's degree from a recognised university (final-year students may apply for Prelims). Age 21–32 (General); SC/ST, OBC, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen relaxations.
exams.pattern: Three stages: (1) Prelims — 2 objective papers (GS-I, CSAT); (2) Mains — 9 descriptive papers (Essay, GS I-IV, Optional Paper I-II, 2 Languages); (3) Personality Test (interview).
exams.attempts_allowed: General 6, OBC 9, SC/ST unlimited (within age cap)

exams.name: CPL (DGCA)
exams.frequency: Continuous (theory exams quarterly + flying hours throughout)
exams.mode: DGCA theory papers (offline) + Class 1 medical + 200 flying hours + RTR Aero
exams.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics & Maths (NIOS allowed). DGCA Class 2 then Class 1 medical. Min age 17 for SPL, 18 for CPL.
exams.pattern: DGCA theory: Air Navigation, Aviation Meteorology, Air Regulations, Technical General + Specific. Plus 200 flying hours, RTR(A) communication exam.
exams.training_cost_inr: ₹45–65 lakh total (ground school ₹1.5–4 L, 200 flying hrs ₹25–30 L, books/exam fees, type rating)
exams.starting_salary_inr_monthly: ₹1.5–3 lakh (First Officer); up to ₹15 lakh/month senior captain
exams.future_demand: CAPA estimates India needs 22,400+ pilots by FY 2030
